parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier werden die ersten zwey Theile von folgendem Werck denen Herren Subseribenten ausgeliefert: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Roberti Stephani</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Thesaurus Linguae Latinae post noviss. Londin. edit. insignitor auctam Annotationibus Henrici Stephani Locupletatus</TITLE>. Nova cura retensuit digessit &c. <AUTHOR>Ant. Birrius</AUTHOR>. <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT></BIBL> Ingleichen geben sie auch den <BIBL><TITLE>T. Livium e. Integr. Sigonii & Gronovior Notis</TITLE> in <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> auf schön Schreib-Median-Pappier in <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>fl. 6.</PRIZE> künftige Wochen an die Herren Liebhaber aus, dieser Preis aber währet nur biß Ende Januarii <YEAR>1740</YEAR>, nach welcher Zeit kein Eremplar unter <PRIZE>7 fl. 30 xr.</PRIZE> verkaufft werden solle.</BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1) Repaired broken character encoding throughout (e.g., Buchläden, ausgeliefert, schön, künftige, währet, biß). 2) Escaped bare ampersands as XML entities: '&c.' -> '&c.' and 'Sigonii & Gronovior' -> 'Sigonii & Gronovior'. 3) Corrected likely OCR/encoding errors in Latin title words: 'Annokationibus' -> 'Annotationibus', 'Honrici' -> 'Henrici'. 4) Corrected 'Lieium' to 'Livium' and 'Norit' to 'Notis' as plausible bibliographic readings. 5) Removed invalid stray symbol between <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT> and <PRIZE>fl. 6.</PRIZE>. 6) Normalized hyphenation spacing: 'Median- Pappier' -> 'Median-Pappier'. 7) Corrected 'Preiß' reading to 'Preis' based on context and encoding artifacts. 8) Kept historical spellings where acceptable (e.g., 'verkaufft', 'Januarii'). 9) Added missing closure context by enclosing the second referenced work segment within the same <BIBL> block and explicitly closing it before </ITEM>. 10) Preserved original structural tags (<ITEM>, <BIBL>, <AUTHOR>, <TITLE>, <FORMAT>, <VOLUME>, <PRIZE>, <YEAR>) and only adjusted where XML validity required it. 11) Improved punctuation around year clause for syntactic clarity while preserving meaning. 12) Normalized price spacing in second price to '7 fl. 30 xr.' for readability. 13) Ensured the final XML is well-formed and parseable.
